mapper.sql: select w.work_order_id as workOrderId, w.work_order_no as workOrderNo, w.domain_type as domainType, w.request_type as requestType, w.order_status as orderStatus, w.project_id as projectId, p.project_name as projectName, w.subject_id as subjectId, w.subject_name as subjectName, w.subject_type as subjectType, w.applicant_dept_id as applicantDeptId, w.applicant_name as applicantName, w.approver_name as approverName, w.executor_name as executorName, w.request_title as requestTitle, w.request_reason as requestReason, w.current_snapshot_json as currentSnapshotJson, w.request_payload_json as requestPayloadJson, w.approval_comment as approvalComment, w.execution_result as executionResult, w.expect_finish_time as expectFinishTime, w.submitted_time as submittedTime, w.approved_time as approvedTime, w.executed_time as executedTime, w.create_by as createBy, w.create_time as createTime, w.update_by as updateBy, w.update_time as updateTime, w.remark from inf_work_order w left join inf_project p on w.project_id = p.project_id
mapper.select:
select count(1) from inf_work_order where domain_type = 'RESOURCE' and subject_id in
#{subjectId}
mapper.insert: insert into inf_work_order ( work_order_no, domain_type, request_type, order_status, project_id, subject_id, subject_name, subject_type, applicant_dept_id, applicant_name, approver_name, executor_name, request_title, request_reason, current_snapshot_json, request_payload_json, approval_comment, execution_result, expect_finish_time, submitted_time, approved_time, executed_time, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{workOrderNo}, #{domainType}, #{requestType}, #{orderStatus}, #{projectId}, #{subjectId}, #{subjectName}, #{subjectType}, #{applicantDeptId}, #{applicantName}, #{approverName}, #{executorName}, #{requestTitle}, #{requestReason}, #{currentSnapshotJson}, #{requestPayloadJson}, #{approvalComment}, #{executionResult}, #{expectFinishTime}, #{submittedTime}, #{approvedTime}, #{executedTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.delete:
delete from inf_work_order where work_order_id in
#{workOrderId}
